# @andes/with-tracker

<br />

A Higher-Order Component (HOC) for adding tracking capabilities to React components, supporting server-side tracking.

<br />

> This is an internal component, if you need to use it please contact us to follow the use case.

<br />

## How to use

<br />

### Installation

> Follow the [general installation guide](../../docs/installation.md).

```bash

npm install --save @andes/with-tracker

```

### Scripts

> Follow the [general scripts usage guide](../../docs/scripts-usage.md) for configuration and how-tos.

Import the component in your page:

```jsx

import { WithTracker } from '@andes/with-tracker';

```

## Public API

| Property | Description | Type | Default | Required |
| -------- | ----------- | ---- | ------- | -------- |
| `component` | Custom component. | `node` | `undefined` | ✅ |
| `metrics` | Custom metrics. | `object: { SSR: Array<string> }` | `{}` |  |

## Examples

For full demo and configuration options, check out the [story for With Tracker](https://andes.adminml.com/web/?selectedKind=WithTracker).

### Basic withTracker

```jsx
import React from 'react';
import { withTracker } from '@andes/with-tracker';

const MyComponent = () => (
    <div>custom content</div>
);

export default withTracker(MyComponent, { name: 'MyComponent' });
```
